user.title: Connect to Polytropic Heat Pump
user.description: Enter the host/IP and port of your Modbus RTU over TCP gateway.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect – check the host, port, and that the gateway is reachable.
error.modbus_error: Connected but received a Modbus error – check the slave address and RS485 wiring.
error.unknown: Unexpected error – check the Home Assistant logs for details.

data.debug_logging: Enable debug logging (logs raw Modbus frames)
